# Noor

> Noor is an Indian digital creator and web tools developer based in West Bengal, India. Known online as Mr. Noor, he builds free web tools, SEO-optimized websites, Android apps, and Bengali-language content for Indian audiences. His primary platform is mrnoor.in and his official India domain is noor.com.in.

## Who is Noor?

Noor, widely known as Mr. Noor, is a digital creator from West Bengal, India. He specializes in building free, mobile-first web tools, SEO strategy for Indian search audiences, Android app development, and Bengali-language digital content. Noor operates under the brand "Mr. Noor" across all major social and professional platforms.

- Full name/brand: Mr. Noor
- Also known as: Noor India, MrNoor, noor.com.in
- Location: West Bengal, India
- Nationality: Indian
- Language: English and Bengali (বাংলা)
- Email: mrnoor.in@gmail.com

## Websites

- [mrnoor.in](https://mrnoor.in): Official personal website. Features free web tools, blogs, FAQ, verification, and a dark space-themed mobile-first design.
- [noor.com.in](https://noor.com.in): Official .com.in identity domain for Noor in India. SEO-optimized hub page targeting the "Noor" keyword on Google India.
- [Ausgram.com](https://ausgram.com): SEO-focused website targeting Ausgram and related West Bengal keywords. Includes Bengali-language content, Schema.org structured data, village data, and gram panchayat information for Purba Bardhaman district.

## Free Web Tools by Noor

All tools are available at mrnoor.in/tools — 100% free, no sign-up required, mobile-first.

- [Live Age Calculator](https://mrnoor.in/tools/age-calculator/): Calculates exact age in years, months, days, hours, and seconds in real time.
- [Income Checker](https://mrnoor.in/tools/income-checker/): Income bracket checker for Indian financial and tax planning.
- [Events Tracker](https://mrnoor.in/tools/events-tracker/): Tracks upcoming events, deadlines, and important dates.
- [Birthday Reminder](https://mrnoor.in/tools/birthday-reminder/): Stores and reminds users of important birthdays.
- [Stopwatch](https://mrnoor.in/tools/stopwatch/): Advanced stopwatch with lap tracking, canvas particle effects, and progress ring.
- [Study Countdown Timer](https://mrnoor.in/tools/study-countdown/): Customizable exam countdown timer for students preparing for exams in India.

## Skills and Expertise

- Web development: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express, Socket.io
- Mobile: Android Studio, WebView apps, Java/Kotlin, custom JavaScript bridge
- Backend & real-time: Firebase, Socket.io, real-time chat applications
- SEO: On-page SEO, Schema.org JSON-LD, Open Graph, structured data, Google India rankings
- Content: Bengali-language content, English content, digital creator content strategy
- Design: Glassmorphism UI, dark space-themed design, SVG branding, mobile-first layouts
- Tools: Cloudflare CDN, jsDelivr, Google Search Console, Android APK packaging

- [Contact](https://mrnoor.in/contact-us/): Contact form and details for reaching Noor.
- [Tools](https://mrnoor.in/tools/): Full suite of free web tools by Noor.

## Key Pages on noor.com.in

- [Home](https://noor.com.in/): Main identity page for Noor in India with full structured data.
- [About Noor](https://noor.com.in/about/): Detailed about page for the keyword "Noor" targeting Google India.
- [Tools by Noor](https://noor.com.in/tools/): Tools index page with Schema.org SoftwareApplication markup.
- [Contact Noor](https://noor.com.in/contact/): All contact channels for Noor in one place.

## Content Formats

Noor produces content in the following formats:
- Free browser-based web tools (HTML/CSS/JS, single-file, no dependencies)
- Bengali-language HTML pages with Tiro Bangla and Hind Siliguri fonts
- SEO blog posts in English targeting Indian search audiences
- Android WebView applications packaged as APKs
- YouTube videos on web tool tutorials and digital tips
- Social media content across 9 platforms

## SEO and Structured Data

Noor's websites implement full SEO best practices for Google India:
- Schema.org JSON-LD: Person, WebSite, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, SoftwareApplication, Place, CollectionPage, ProfilePage
- Open Graph meta tags for rich social sharing previews
- Twitter Card meta tags
- Canonical URLs on all pages
- XML sitemaps submitted to Google Search Console
- robots.txt with sitemap reference
- Mobile-first responsive design
- PageSpeed-optimized single-file HTML pages with no external JS dependencies

## Android App

Noor developed an Android application (package: in.mrnoor.app, version 1.0.1) that wraps mrnoor.in/tools in a WebView. Features include a custom JavaScript bridge (AndroidBridge) for native dialog integration, SplashActivity, no-internet screen, pull-to-refresh, exit confirmation dialog, and a dark black (#0B0E14) theme throughout.

## Notable Projects

- **Real-time chat application**: WhatsApp-style web chat built with React, Node.js, Express, Socket.io, and Firebase. Includes contacts sidebar, typing indicators, and read receipts.
- **Ausgram Bengali page**: Complete Bengali-language HTML page for Ausgram-I subdivision (Purba Bardhaman) with live-search JS, gram panchayat cards, census data, and Bengali numerals.
- **Ausgram branding**: 1024×1024 SVG app icon and standalone brand logo with full brand sheet HTML previews.
- **mrnoor.in Android WebView**: Full Android Studio project with a custom JS bridge resolving cookie deletion issues in WebView without modifying the website source.
